image:image.image:title: About TechFit | India's Premier Gym & Sports Infrastructure Company
image:image.image:caption: Founded in Mumbai, TechFit is India's leading gym, wellness and sports infrastructure company. Learn about our story, leadership, manufacturing facility and vision.

image:image.image:title: Contact TechFit | Get a Free Gym & Wellness Consultation
image:image.image:caption: Get in touch with TechFit for a free gym setup consultation. Call +91 98201 66910 or visit us at Plot No 309, Coal Bunder Road E, Reay Road, Darukhana, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400010, India.
